input: We are an AI-powered logistics SaaS helping small businesses automate shipping. $20/mo subscription, 500 paying customers, growing 15% monthly.

output.strengths: Recurring revenue, strong growth rate, clear pricing

input: A social app for dog owners to schedule playdates. Pre-revenue, no team, founder is a solo designer.
